title: xylosma heterophylla
intro: Xylosma heterophylla, also known as the Philippine mulberry, is a tropical plant species native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The leaves and bark of the plant have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, providing numerous health benefits. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical applications, to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
